title: The Cop
writer: Elliott J. Clawson, Tay Garnett, John W. Krafft
actors: William Boyd, Alan Hale, Jacqueline Logan
plot: Pete Smith, a lift bridge operator in a harbor, feels lonely in his cabin, his only visitor being a policeman on patrol, Sgt. Coughlin. One night, after hearing shots, Smith gives shelter to a wounded man, whom he hides from Cough...
